# VINTZ — Vintage Design Furniture & Lighting

> VINTZ (vintz.nl) is a curated vintage design dealer based in Grubbenvorst, the Netherlands, run by Marco. We sell authentic vintage design furniture and lighting from the 1950s through the 1990s — original pieces, no reproductions. Worldwide fully insured shipping in custom-built wooden crates. 100% five-star rated. Contact: info@vintz.nl, +31 6 425 600 76.

Key facts:
- All pieces are original vintage, hand-picked for design significance, quality and condition.
- Prices are in EUR and exclude shipping; shipping quotes on request.
- Reupholstery service available on request.
- Collection in person by appointment (the Netherlands).

## Collections

- [Furniture](https://www.vintz.nl/furniture/): vintage sofas, lounge chairs, dining tables, cabinets and sideboards
- [Lighting](https://www.vintz.nl/lighting/): vintage pendant lamps, floor lamps, table lamps and chandeliers
- [Various](https://www.vintz.nl/various/): ceramics, mirrors, display cabinets and decorative objects

## Designers & makers in the current collection

Art Vannes, Artifort, Atelier Capron, Atelier Charles Dudouyt, Bremshey, Charles Dudouyt, De Sede, Ettore Sottsass, Fabricius & Kastholm, Faema, Franco Campo & Carlo Graffi, Freres Cloutier, Gaetano Sciolari, Gavina, Goffredo Reggiani, Günther Lambert, Hirtshals Savvaerk, Home, Ikea, Jean-Pierre Vitrac, Jelmer Reus, Kill International, Leolux, Manade, P.R.O.F.A., Paolo Buffa, Peter van der Ham, Rainer Daumiller, Reggiani Illuminazione, Robert Haussmann, Roger Capron, Rosenthal Studio-Line, Scheurich, Scheurich and Greulich, Sciolari, Tobia Scarpa, Verner Panton, Vetri Murano, Vistosi, Zumtobel

## Currently available highlights

- [Charles Dudouyt Art Deco Oak Cabinet, France 1930s-1940s](https://www.vintz.nl/p/charles-dudouyt-art-deco-oak-cabinet-france/): Charles Dudouyt, Atelier Charles Dudouyt, 1930s-1940s
- [De Sede DS-11 Modular Sofa in Cognac Patchwork Leather](https://www.vintz.nl/p/de-sede-ds11-modular-sofa-cognac-patchwork-leather/): De Sede, 1970s
- [Verner Panton Vilbert Chair for Ikea](https://www.vintz.nl/p/verner-panton-vilbert-chair-ikea-postmodern-1993/): Verner Panton, Ikea, 1993
- [Art Deco Bedside Lamps with Decorated Glass Shades, Pair](https://www.vintz.nl/p/art-deco-bedside-lamps-glass-shades-pair/): 1930s
- [Günther Lambert Red Glass Vase, Signed](https://www.vintz.nl/p/gunther-lambert-red-glass-vase/): Günther Lambert, 1980s-1990s
- [Vintage Stone and Wood Owl Figurines, Family of Five](https://www.vintz.nl/p/vintage-stone-owl-figurines-family/): 1960s-1970s
- [Art Deco Copper Ceiling Lamp, 1930s](https://www.vintz.nl/p/art-deco-copper-ceiling-lamp-1930/): 1930s
- [Italian Desk Lamp Prototype](https://www.vintz.nl/p/bureau-lamp-prototype-italy/)
- [Vetri Murano Memphis-style Table Lamp](https://www.vintz.nl/p/vetri-murano-memphis-80/): Vetri Murano, 1980s
- [Vistosi Lacrima Pendant Lamp](https://www.vintz.nl/p/vistosi-lacrima/): Vistosi, 1960s
- [De Sede DS-31 Slow Horses](https://www.vintz.nl/p/de-sede-ds-31-slow-horses/): De Sede
- [Bronzen brutalist lamp](https://www.vintz.nl/p/bronzen-brutalist-lamp/)
- [Stilnovo 8 spaaks](https://www.vintz.nl/p/stilnovo-8-spaaks/)
- [Wooden large floor lamp 60 France ?](https://www.vintz.nl/p/wooden-large-floor-lamp-60-france/)
- [Scarpa ? Tafel](https://www.vintz.nl/p/scarpa-tafel/)
- [Vogel lamp](https://www.vintz.nl/p/vogel-lamp/)

## Stories (blog)

- [Vintage Italian Medical Display Cabinets by P.R.O.F.A. | Aluminum & Glass | 1960s Padua](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/vintage-italian-medical-display-cabinets-by-profa-aluminum-amp-glass-1960s-padua/): How 1960s Italian manufacturers like P.R.O.F.A. turned medical display cabinets into mid-century modern design icons…
- [One Hundred Years of Art Deco: Paris Celebrates a Century of Geometric Glamour](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/one-hundred-years-of-art-deco-paris-celebrates-a-century-of-geometric-glamour/): Paris celebrates 100 years of Art Deco. The Musée des Arts Décoratifs hosts a major exhibition with 1,000+ works of…
- [The Pigreco Chair: How Tobia Scarpa Redefined Italian Design at 24](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/the-pigreco-chair-how-tobia-scarpa-redefined-italian-design-at-24/): How 24-year-old Tobia Scarpa revolutionized Italian design with the Pigreco chair. A 1960s Gavina icon in walnut —…
- [Paolo Buffa: The Architect Who Redefined Italian Elegance](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/paolo-buffa-the-architect-who-redefined-italian-elegance/): Discover Paolo Buffa, the Italian architect who transformed postwar furniture into art. Elegant mid-century designs…
- [Roger Capron: The Man Who Turned Ceramics Into Furniture](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/roger-capron-the-man-who-turned-ceramics-into-furniture/): Meet Roger Capron, the French ceramist who transformed tiles into iconic furniture. His 1960s-70s coffee tables are…
- [De Sede: When a Saddle Shop Became a Design Legend](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/de-sede-when-a-saddle-shop-became-a-design-legend/): From Swiss saddle shop to design legend. Discover how De Sede transformed premium leather craftsmanship into iconic…
- [Fabricius & Kastholm](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/fabricius-amp-kastholm-when-a-carpenter-met-a-blacksmith/): The story of Preben Fabricius and Jørgen Kastholm — a carpenter and a blacksmith who created some of the finest Danish…
- [Carlo Mollino and the Turin School](https://www.vintz.nl/blog/carlo-mollino-and-the-turin-school/): Explore Carlo Mollino and the Turin School of design. How this visionary Italian architect influenced Campo & Graffi…
